description.value:
Source: Ariadne's Book of Legends - Alpha v1.2, p. 100.

Tier III: Sovereign

Prerequisite: Powerful Presence

Absolute Authority. When a creature within 120 feet of you makes a saving throw against one of your spells or class features, you can use your reaction to force it to

fail on that saving throw. Once you use this feature, you cannot do so again until you finish a short or long rest.

Court of One. You are permanently under the effects of the Glibness spell. This effect cannot be dispelled. Additionally, creatures of your choice of CR 10 or lower that lay eyes upon you for the first time between long rests are charmed by you for the next 24 hours, during which they regard you as their sovereign, follow your commands, and will not willingly act against your interests. This effect ends for a creature if you or your allies deal damage to it.

Path Connections Overlord. Instead of the Greater Charms Heroic Perk, you can take the Thrall Perk, changing to the Overlord path.

source.custom: Original en-US text from Alpha v1.2
